properties.description: Fires when a parking VM is reported as unhealthy in the VMHealthStatus_CL custom table.

allOf.query:
VMHealthStatus_CL
| where healthState == "Unhealthy"
| summarize unhealthyCount = count() by vmName, city, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)

properties.description: Fires when a previously unhealthy parking VM is reported as healthy again.

allOf.query:
VMHealthStatus_CL
| where healthState == "Healthy" and previousState == "Unhealthy"
| summarize recoveryCount = count() by vmName, city, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)

settings.script:
[base64('#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Update package lists
apt-get update

# Install required packages
apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg rsyslog

# Setup NodeSource repository for Node.js 18.x
mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/gpgkey/nodesource-repo.gpg.key | gpg --dearmor --batch --yes -o /etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg 2>/dev/null || true
echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg] https://deb.nodesource.com/node_18.x nodistro main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nodesource.list

# Install Node.js
apt-get update
apt-get install -y nodejs

# Verify installation
node --version
npm --version
')]
